pi_items.source: Analyzed install_gvsig.sh which downloads and unzips ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip into /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/.
Confirmed shapefile base name is ne_110m_admin_0_countries, which is the standard default layer name assigned by GIS software upon loading.

privileged_info_summary: The target dataset is the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp' shapefile downloaded from Natural Earth, containing 177 country polygon features. It is located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp'. When loaded into gvSIG, the layer defaults to the shapefile's base name: 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries'.
